title: Sumerian/Akkadian: The Tukulti-Ninurta Epic
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Tukulti-Ninurta Epic.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Tukulti-Ninurta Epic.

translation.text: From 'The Tukulti-Ninurta Epic': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
